gist.headline: Traveling light
gist.blurb: We've streamlined the account profile API to keep things simple and privacy-focused. Now returning just the essentials: your GitHub username and avatar!
gist.summary: Streamlined the account profile API endpoint to return only essential public fields, updating the SDK and documentation to match.
gist.impact: Developers get a cleaner, privacy-focused profile payload that makes integrations simpler and more secure.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee holding a clean, minimalist ID card with just a picture and username, having discarded unnecessary heavy paperwork. Represents the streamlined, lighter API payload.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a clean, minimalist digital ID card showing just a pixelated avatar and username. She is happily tossing away heavy, unnecessary paper forms into a lime green (#ecf874) bin. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

She is happily tossing away heavy, unnecessary paper forms into a lime green (#ecf874) bin. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background.
